name: Behalf.bot — Dating
description: Dating-app automation as a sandboxed subagent: photo verification consensus engine, RU/UA/BY safety floor, reply-gated catfish screening, concierge framing, Angel Protocol prereq for in-person meets. Bound to a single ops channel; never co-runs with the main session.

enabled.description: Top-level plugin toggle. Dating automation is dormant by default — opt-in only.

social_channel_id.description: Discord channel ID the dating subagent posts to. ALL dating-related output (session reports, escalations, photo-verification verdicts) lands here. NEVER co-mingle with the primary briefing channel.

social_webhook_env_var.description: Environment-variable name holding the Discord webhook URL for social_channel_id.

installer_facts_path.description: Absolute path to installer-facts.md (the canonical source of truth for facts about the installer that the agent may relay to a match — height, location dodge, schedule constraints, etc.). Each installer authors their own; nothing ships in chassis.

cleared_matches_path.description: Absolute path to cleared-matches.json — preauth clearance store. Read at session start.

pending_instructions_path.description: Absolute path to pending-instructions.md — installer's real-time overrides inbox.

scheduling_blocks_path.description: Absolute path to scheduling-blocks.md — active windows blocked for date proposals.

verifications_output_root.description: Absolute path where verify-match.py writes per-match evidence directories (screenshots + report.md + raw.json).

verify_venv_path.description: Absolute path to the dedicated Python venv for verify-match (Playwright). Created at install time.

transport.description: Hinge has no usable web flow — always Android emulator via ADB.

avd_name.description: Android Virtual Device name. Created at install time via the Android SDK manager.

spoofed_lat.description: GPS-spoof latitude. Reset on every emulator restart via telnet `geo fix`. Installer's local city only — NEVER commit installer's home coords.

spoofed_lon.description: GPS-spoof longitude. Same constraint as spoofed_lat.

safety_floor.description: Non-negotiable safety rules. Disabling any of these requires opening a follow-up issue acknowledging the trade-off — chassis-default is full safety floor on.

mode.description: When the photo-verification consensus engine runs. reply_gated = run only after the match replies to the opener (default; cheapest + lowest information leakage). match_gated = run on every match. off = NOT recommended; provided only for installers who explicitly accept the risk.

auto_reject_signals.description: Which engine results trigger a silent auto-reject. Yandex is similarity-only and never sufficient on its own — fixed in the consensus engine, not configurable here.

regional_default_reject.description: Default-reject-with-override-gate for high-risk source markets. Calibrated against catfish-targeting clusters seen on the V1 install (Eva, Jacqueline, Nadya — three sketchy profiles in 72h). Installer can edit the country list for their threat model.

country_codes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes flagged for default-reject + override-gate scrutiny.

five_exchange_rule.description: At 5 exchanges with a match, screenshot the thread to the installer for explicit approve/deny before any reveal-and-pivot or scheduling. Pierces no other rule.

angel_protocol_required_before_in_person.description: Hard prereq: in-person meets are blocked until the angel-protocol plugin is enabled, configured, and a duress codeword listener + auto-checkin schedule are live. Until then, all in-person counter-proposals deflect to a video call. See plugins/angel-protocol.

anti_doxx.description: Never reveal installer's neighborhood, home address, real phone number, day-of-week routine, or any other doxx-able fact in any outbound dating-app message, calendar invite, or Zoom small-talk. Public-facing answer is always city-level only.

concierge_framing.description: All outbound messages from the agent are first-person-as-assistant, third-person-about-the-installer. Never `I` in a way that could be mistaken for the installer himself. The reveal is upfront from message #1.

never_dinner_first.description: Never propose dinner or a sit-down meal as the first in-person meet. Coffee or video only.

never_private_first.description: Never propose a private location (her place, his place, hotel, AirBnB, secluded park) for the first in-person. Hard insistence from her on a private first meet is treated as an operator/scammer signal.

face_scorer_enabled.description: Local CLIP-based attractiveness scorer. Token-free; runs against installer's curated taste-refs/positive/.

activation._note: Dating automation is fully opt-in. Manifest activation is gated on installer's explicit opt-in via chassis.config.yaml modules.dating.enabled = true.

_chassis_v1_status._explanation: Plugin ships fully (manifest + skill + scripts + templates), but the safety_floor.angel_protocol_required_before_in_person flag depends on plugins/angel-protocol being enabled and Phase 0 monitoring being live. The angel-protocol plugin currently ships scaffold-only — its monitoring scripts are deferred per <v1-reference-install> #505. Until angel-protocol Phase 0 ports cleanly to non-Apple-Find-My topology, the dating plugin will hard-block in-person meet proposals and deflect to video, even when the installer schedules manually outside the agent. This is by design — see docs/plugins/dating.md § Activation prereqs.
